# Copilot Instructions

Follow the repository standards in [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md).

Critical requirements:
- Keep TypeScript strictness and separation of concerns (`domain`/`application`/`services`/`ui`).
- Maintain or improve test coverage (minimum 80% thresholds).
- Use Conventional Commit PR titles and squash-merge semantics.
- Keep release/deploy behavior aligned with automated GitHub Releases from `main`.
